summary: Frontend regression test for Youtube ReferenceError on /dashboard/new. Bug fix VERIFIED: page loads cleanly, RichEditor renders, all 16 toolbar buttons including rt-youtube present, and YouTube embed via prompt successfully creates a youtube-nocookie iframe in the editor content. Zero console errors / pageerrors.

warnings.issue: Tiptap console warning: Duplicate extension names found: ['link', 'underline']. StarterKit v3 already ships Link + Underline; importing @tiptap/extension-link and @tiptap/extension-underline separately duplicates them. Non-breaking but should be cleaned up (either drop the separate imports or disable them in StarterKit.configure({ link: false, underline: false })).

action_items: Optional: silence Tiptap duplicate-extension warning for 'link' and 'underline' in RichEditor.jsx by removing the separate imports (StarterKit v3 includes them) or disabling them in StarterKit config.
critical_code_review_comments: RichEditor.jsx duplicates Link + Underline extensions with StarterKit (Tiptap 3). Harmless today, could cause issues with future config.
test_credentials: Seeded admin via mongosh. session_token=test_session_1783032450435, user_id=test-user-1783032450435
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 admin user + 1 session in test_database (users, user_sessions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editor page fully functional. YouTube iframe embed confirmed (src=https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ). Only outstanding item is the duplicate-extension Tiptap warning.
rca of the issue: Root cause was missing `import { Youtube } from '@tiptap/extension-youtube'` in RichEditor.jsx despite Youtube.configure(...) and setYoutubeVideo() usage. Fix (import added at line 7 + YoutubeIcon at line 11) resolves the ReferenceError. Verified by loading /dashboard/new with an admin session cookie, confirming rich-editor + rt-youtube render with 0 runtime errors, and successfully embedding a YouTube URL.
